channel.title: PCI DSS on pcidss.ae | PCI DSS Compliance & Payment Security UAE
channel.description: Recent content in PCI DSS on pcidss.ae | PCI DSS Compliance & Payment Security UAE

item.title: PCI DSS for Fintechs UAE: Building Compliant Payment Infrastructure from Day One
item.description: The best time to build PCI DSS compliance into your fintech is at architecture design stage. Here’s how UAE fintechs achieve compliance faster and cheaper by getting the payment architecture right from the start.

item.title: SAQ Types Explained: Which PCI DSS SAQ Does Your UAE Business Need?
item.description: The most common PCI DSS mistake is selecting the wrong SAQ type. This guide explains every SAQ type and how to determine which one your UAE business needs for annual acquiring bank submission.

item.title: PCI DSS Compliance in UAE: What Merchants Need to Know in 2025
item.description: Every UAE merchant accepting Visa or Mastercard must demonstrate PCI DSS compliance annually. Here’s what that means, how the merchant levels work, and the fastest path to certification.
